message:
🌱 Add crossplane: Granular management policies (e.g. ability to ignore mission (#1601)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "crossplane-3516-granular-management-policies-e-g-ability-to-ignore-changes-etc",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "crossplane: Granular management policies (e.g. ability to ignore changes etc.)",
+    "description": "Granular management policies (e.g. ability to ignore changes etc.). Requested by 39+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current crossplane deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your crossplane version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nhelm list -n crossplane 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working crossplane installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review crossplane configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant crossplane configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get configmap -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=crossplane\n```\n### What problem are you facing?\n\nCrossplane provides reconciliation of all parameters under `spec`.  There are cases where this is not desired post initial creation.  Such as when a parameter is managed outside of Crossplane."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Granular management policies (e.g. ability to ignore…",
+        "description": "As pointed by  [here](https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/3531#discussion_r1072945963), another solution could be something like `spec.initProvider`:\n\n```yaml\napiVersion: eks.aws.upbound.io/v1beta1\nkind: NodeGroup\nmetadata:\n  name: sample-eks-ng\nspec:\n  # Desired state that will be used\n```yaml\nspec:\n  ignoreChanges:\n    - desiredCapacity\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get events -n crossplane --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Granular management policies (e.g. ability to ignore…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "As pointed by  [here](https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/3531#discussion_r1072945963), another solution could be something like `spec.initProvider`:\n\n```yaml\napiVersion: eks.aws.upbound.io/v1beta1\nkind: NodeGroup\nmetadata:\n  name: sample-eks-ng\nspec:\n  # Desired state that will be used only on initial creation (optional)\n  initProvider:\n    scalingConfig:\n      - desiredSize: 1\n  #",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "spec:\n  ignoreChanges:\n    - desiredCapacity",
+        "spec:\n  ignoreChanges:\n    - readCapacity\n    - writeCapacity",
+        "apiVersion: eks.aws.upbound.io/v1beta1\nkind: NodeGroup\nmetadata:\n  name: sample-eks-ng\nspec:\n  # Desired state that will be used only on initial creation (optional)\n  initProvider:\n    scalingConfig:\n      - desiredSize: 1\n  # Desired state that will be enforced on every reconcile (optional, if the resource already exists)\n  forProvider:\n    scalingConfig:\n      - maxSize: 3\n        minSize: 1\nstatus:\n  # The observed state, updated on every reconcile.\n  atProvider:\n    scalingConfig:\n      - desiredSize: 3\n        maxSize: 3\n        minSize: 1"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "crossplane",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "crossplane"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/issues/3516",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane"
+    },
+    "reactions": 39,
+    "comments": 7,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with crossplane installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-21T06:16:57.748Z",

+}
